name: N-acetyl-L-tyrosine
mechanism: Acetylated tyrosine donor that is deacetylated to tyrosine and can feed catecholamine-precursor pools; evidence that it outperforms L-tyrosine as a CNS precursor is limited.
contraindications: Levodopa / other large neutral amino acids (theoretical transport competition after deacetylation).
summary: Acetylated tyrosine donor that is deacetylated to tyrosine and can feed catecholamine-precursor pools; evidence that it outperforms L-tyrosine as a CNS precursor is limited.
